'''Home Fleet's Battle Assessment Division''' was the strategic planning and analysis division of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] it was headed by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ixidro Legorburu]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
